g.onclick: sendPrompt('What protocols do clients use to communicate with the Zorvyn Finance Backend?')
sendPrompt('How does Bucket4j rate limiting work in the Zorvyn backend?')
sendPrompt('What is the CorrelationIdFilter and why is it important for tracing?')
sendPrompt('How does JwtAuthenticationFilter validate bearer tokens and map roles?')
sendPrompt('Explain the IAM module responsibilities in Zorvyn Finance Backend')
sendPrompt('What does AuthController and AuthService do in the IAM module?')
sendPrompt('What does UserController and UserService manage in the IAM module?')
sendPrompt('What data models does the IAM module manage?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Finance module and its write-heavy operations')
sendPrompt('What does FinancialRecordController and FinancialRecordService do?')
sendPrompt('What is the FinancialRecord data model and what does it track?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Analytics module and its caching strategy')
sendPrompt('What does DashboardController and DashboardService do?')
sendPrompt('How does Caffeine Cache improve analytics performance with @Cacheable?')
sendPrompt('How does the Audit Logging System work asynchronously via Spring Events?')
sendPrompt('What is GlobalExceptionHandler and how does it implement RFC 7807 Problem Details?')
sendPrompt('How does Flyway manage database schema migrations in this backend?')
sendPrompt('How are PostgreSQL tables isolated by module prefix in Zorvyn Finance Backend?')
sendPrompt('When and why is the H2 in-memory database used in the Zorvyn backend?')
